log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Vedalken — Iron Concentration's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:13+3=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:4+-2=2 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:19+-2=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 1/3 targets affected.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Vedalken — Iron Concentration with Greataxe: [d20:15+9=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 27 damage. Vedalken — Iron Concentration HP: 40/67
Frost Giant attacks Vedalken — Iron Concentration with Greataxe: [d20:9+9=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 30 damage. Vedalken — Iron Concentration HP: 10/67
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Vedalken — Iron Concentration with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Vedalken — Iron Concentration's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hypnotic Pattern
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Vedalken — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Vedalken — Iron Concentration.
→ Vedalken — Iron Concentration healed for 8 HP. HP: 18/67
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Vedalken — Iron Concentration with Greataxe: [d20:5+9=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 29 damage. Vedalken — Iron Concentration HP: 0/67
→ Vedalken — Iron Concentration loses concentration on Greater Invisibility! [CON save 13 vs DC 14]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
